description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image with a postgres:alpine service and a cache of vendor/ruby. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq nodejs libpq-dev, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and executes bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor. Add a rails job in the default test stage that runs rails db:migrate, rails db:seed, and rails test, and sets variables DATABASE_URL, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSSWORD, POSTGRES_USER, and RAILS_ENV for the test environment. The job uses the before_script, the cache, and runs on all branches without additional rules.
